name: Sesame Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef, salt, soy sauce, and cornstarch. Mix well with hand.
2. Bring oil in wok to 400°F (204°C). Deep fry beef for 1 minute. Drain.
3. Remove beef from the oil. Bring oil back to temperature.
4. Deep fry beef for another 1 minute. Drain and remove to a platter.
5. Mix ingredients into a smooth, thin sauce.
6. Heat in saucepan and pour over beef. Add chopped carrot, peanuts, or any desired additions when serving.
